final_answer: Individuals should consider getting tested for COVID-19 if they exhibit symptoms of the illness, as testing is essential for confirming infection [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]. This includes contacting a doctor if fully vaccinated and showing symptoms [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00013]. Children with symptoms should also seek medical care and consider testing [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00021]. Overall, testing is crucial for anyone who believes they may be infected [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00012].
